tokens.build: Build design tokens for a brand and theme. Returns compiled CSS variables and token artifacts. Use apply=true to write output files.
structuredData.fetch: Fetch structured data exports (components, tokens, or manifest). Supports ETag caching, version pinning, and version listing.
repl.validate: Validate a UiSchema tree or patch against the Design Lab schema. Accepts schemaRef from design.compose. Returns validation errors, warnings, and optionally a normalized tree.
repl.render: Render a validated UiSchema into HTML/CSS preview output. Accepts schemaRef from design.compose. Supports document and fragment formats; HTML/fragments are returned only when apply=true (apply=false returns metadata-only preview).
brand.apply: Apply brand token overlays using alias or RFC 6902 patch strategy. Requires a delta object. Use apply=true to write changes to disk.
catalog.list: List available OODS components from the design system catalog. Filter by category, trait, or rendering context.
code.generate: Generate framework-specific code (React, Vue, or HTML) from a validated UiSchema tree. Accepts schemaRef from design.compose. Supports TypeScript and token-based styling.
design.compose: Compose a complete UiSchema from a natural-language intent description. Returns schemaRef for reuse in validate/render/code.generate.
pipeline: Execute the full design pipeline (compose -> validate -> render -> codegen) in a single call. Supports optional validation/render skipping, accessibility checks, and schema persistence.
health: Check MCP server readiness and subsystem status, including registry counts, token artifact availability, and schema store state.
map.create: Create a component-to-trait mapping between an external design system and OODS. Includes property translations and coercion rules.
map.list: List all component-to-trait mappings. Optionally filter by external design system name.
map.resolve: Resolve an external component to its OODS trait mapping with property translations.
map.update: Update an existing component-to-trait mapping by ID. Supports changing traits, property mappings, confidence, and notes.
map.delete: Delete a component-to-trait mapping by ID.
object.list: List OODS objects from the registry with optional filtering by domain, maturity, or trait.
object.show: Show a full OODS object definition, including composed trait schema and view extensions.
schema.delete: Delete a saved schema by name and remove it from schema index metadata.
schema.list: List saved schema metadata from the schema index. Supports object/context/tag filters.
schema.load: Load a previously saved schema by name and return a reusable schemaRef plus schema metadata for validate/render/code generation.
schema.save: Persist a composed UiSchema by name from schemaRef. Stores schema metadata (name, version, object/context, tags, timestamps) for reuse across sessions.
diag.snapshot: Capture a diagnostic snapshot bundle of the current design system state for debugging and reproducibility.
reviewKit.create: Create a review kit artifact bundle for design review workflows.
billing.reviewKit: Generate a billing review kit comparing provider fixtures (Stripe, Chargebee) for a billing object.
billing.switchFixtures: Switch the active billing fixture provider for Storybook scenarios. Use apply=true to record the switch.
a11y.scan: Run WCAG accessibility contrast checks against design tokens. Optionally include a UiSchema for component inventory.
purity.audit: Audit design token purity and detect style drift or non-standard overrides.
vrt.run: Run visual regression tests against the current component state.
release.verify: Verify release readiness for specified packages. Checks changelogs, versions, and build artifacts.
release.tag: Create a release tag in the repository. Requires a tag name; optionally include a message.
viz.compose: Compose a visualization schema from chart type, data bindings, and/or object viz traits. Returns schemaRef for pipeline reuse. Supports bar, line, area, and point chart types with axis, color, and size encodings.
